name_en: Top-tier replica exclusive photo📷【Lisa Wallet】 M12536 Pearl Gunmetal M12674 Pearl White (Embossed)
name_cn:
Top-tier replica exclusive photo📷【Lisa Wallet】 M12536 Pearl Gunmetal M12674 Pearl White (Embossed)
This Lisa Wallet is made from iconic Monogram Empreinte leather with a 'shiny' effect, perfect for party season. Its compact design easily slips into small bags or clutches, and the zipper is adorned with a Monogram flower charm. Inside, there are multiple pockets for coins and bills, plus four card slots.
Size: 9 x 11.5 x 1.5 cm
